//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//|                        Sentinel_RAM_v520.mq5                     |
//|                          Copyright 2024, Sentinel AI             |
//|                    Ponte MT5 → Memória Compartilhada → Kafka     |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
#property copyright "Sentinel AI"
#property link      ""
#property version   "5.20"
#property strict

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| IMPORTS — DLL do Windows                                         |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
#import "kernel32.dll"
   long   CreateFileMappingW(long hFile, long lpAttr, uint flProtect,
                              uint dwMaxHigh, uint dwMaxLow, string lpName);
   long   OpenFileMappingW(uint dwAccess, bool bInherit, string lpName);
   long   MapViewOfFile(long hMap, uint dwAccess, uint dwOffHigh,
                        uint dwOffLow, ulong dwBytes);
   bool   UnmapViewOfFile(long lpBase);
   bool   CloseHandle(long hObject);
   void   RtlMoveMemory(long dest, uchar &src[], uint len);
   void   RtlMoveMemory(uchar &dest[], long src, uint len);
#import

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| PARÂMETROS DE ENTRADA                                            |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
sinput group "=== Configurações Gerais ==="
input int     InpTimerMs         = 50;              // Intervalo do timer (ms)
input bool    InpAutoSelect      = true;            // Auto-adicionar TODOS os símbolos do servidor
input int     InpSymsPerCycle    = 200;             // Símbolos processados por ciclo do timer

sinput group "=== Memória Compartilhada ==="
input string  InpMMFName         = "Local\\B3RAM";  // Nome da memória compartilhada
input int     InpRecordBytes     = 128;             // Bytes por registro
input int     InpRecordCount     = 8192;            // Quantidade de registros (slots)
input int     InpFocusSlot       = 0;               // Slot reservado para símbolo em foco

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| CONSTANTES — Layout de memória (offsets em bytes)               |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
#define BID_OFF     0
#define ASK_OFF     8
#define VOL_OFF     16
#define TS_OFF      24
#define ANO_OFF     32
#define HB_OFF      36
#define WF_OFF      40
#define SYM_OFF     44
#define SYM_BYTES   16

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| VARIÁVEIS GLOBAIS                                                |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
long   hMap         = 0;
long   pBase        = 0;
int    hb_global    = 0;
int    healthCheck  = 0;
int    g_rotIdx     = 0;     // ponteiro de rotação pelos símbolos
int    RECORD_BYTES;
int    RECORD_COUNT;
int    FOCUS_SLOT;
string MMF_NAME;

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| UNION — Serialização de double                                   |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
union DoubleSerializer { double d; uchar b[8]; };
DoubleSerializer ds;

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| BUFFERS AUXILIARES                                               |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
uchar b4[4];
uchar b8[8];
uchar bSym[16];

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| WriteI32                                                         |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void WriteI32(long base, int off, int v)
{
   b4[0] = (uchar)( v        & 0xFF);
   b4[1] = (uchar)((v >>  8) & 0xFF);
   b4[2] = (uchar)((v >> 16) & 0xFF);
   b4[3] = (uchar)((v >> 24) & 0xFF);
   RtlMoveMemory(base + off, b4, 4);
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| WriteI64                                                         |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void WriteI64(long base, int off, long v)
{
   b8[0] = (uchar)( v        & 0xFF);
   b8[1] = (uchar)((v >>  8) & 0xFF);
   b8[2] = (uchar)((v >> 16) & 0xFF);
   b8[3] = (uchar)((v >> 24) & 0xFF);
   b8[4] = (uchar)((v >> 32) & 0xFF);
   b8[5] = (uchar)((v >> 40) & 0xFF);
   b8[6] = (uchar)((v >> 48) & 0xFF);
   b8[7] = (uchar)((v >> 56) & 0xFF);
   RtlMoveMemory(base + off, b8, 8);
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| WriteF64                                                         |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void WriteF64(long base, int off, double v)
{
   ds.d = v;
   RtlMoveMemory(base + off, ds.b, 8);
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| WriteSymbolAscii                                                 |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void WriteSymbolAscii(long base, int off, string sym)
{
   ArrayInitialize(bSym, 0);
   StringToCharArray(sym, bSym, 0, SYM_BYTES - 1, CP_ACP);
   RtlMoveMemory(base + off, bSym, SYM_BYTES);
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| SlotForSymbol — Hash FNV-1a                                      |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
int SlotForSymbol(string sym)
{
   string s = sym;
   StringToUpper(s);
   uint h   = 2166136261;
   int  len = StringLen(s);
   for(int i = 0; i < len; i++)
      h = (h ^ (uint)StringGetCharacter(s, i)) * 16777619;
   return (int)((h % (uint)(RECORD_COUNT - 1)) + 1);
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| ProcessSymbol                                                    |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void ProcessSymbol(string sym, long tsMs, bool isFocus = false)
{
   double bid = SymbolInfoDouble(sym, SYMBOL_BID);
   double ask = SymbolInfoDouble(sym, SYMBOL_ASK);
   if(bid <= 0.0 && ask <= 0.0) return;

   int  slot    = isFocus ? FOCUS_SLOT : SlotForSymbol(sym);
   long recBase = pBase + (long)(slot * RECORD_BYTES);
   long vol     = SymbolInfoInteger(sym, SYMBOL_VOLUME);

   WriteI32(recBase, WF_OFF, 1);
   WriteF64(recBase, BID_OFF, bid);
   WriteF64(recBase, ASK_OFF, ask);
   WriteI64(recBase, VOL_OFF, vol);
   WriteI64(recBase, TS_OFF,  tsMs);
   WriteI32(recBase, ANO_OFF, 0);
   WriteI32(recBase, HB_OFF,  hb_global);
   WriteSymbolAscii(recBase, SYM_OFF, sym);
   WriteI32(recBase, WF_OFF, 0);
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| AutoSelectAllSymbols                                             |
//|                                                                  |
//| Varre TODOS os símbolos disponíveis no servidor da corretora     |
//| (SymbolsTotal(false)) e os ativa no Market Watch.               |
//| O usuário NÃO precisa fazer NADA manualmente no MT5.            |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void AutoSelectAllSymbols()
{
   int total = SymbolsTotal(false);   // false = servidor completo da corretora
   int added = 0;

   for(int i = 0; i < total; i++)
   {
      string sym = SymbolName(i, false);
      if(StringLen(sym) == 0) continue;
      if(!SymbolInfoInteger(sym, SYMBOL_SELECT))
      {
         SymbolSelect(sym, true);
         added++;
      }
   }

   Print("AutoSelect concluído: ",
         total, " símbolos no servidor | ",
         added, " novos no Market Watch | ",
         SymbolsTotal(true), " total no Market Watch agora.");
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| InitSharedMemory                                                 |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
bool InitSharedMemory()
{
   uint totalBytes = (uint)(RECORD_BYTES * RECORD_COUNT);

   hMap = CreateFileMappingW(-1, 0, 0x04, 0, totalBytes, MMF_NAME);
   if(hMap == 0)
   {
      Print("ERRO CreateFileMappingW: ", GetLastError());
      return false;
   }

   pBase = MapViewOfFile(hMap, 0x0002, 0, 0, (ulong)totalBytes);
   if(pBase == 0)
   {
      Print("ERRO MapViewOfFile: ", GetLastError());
      CloseHandle(hMap);
      hMap = 0;
      return false;
   }

   for(int slot = 0; slot < RECORD_COUNT; slot++)
      WriteI32(pBase + (long)(slot * RECORD_BYTES), WF_OFF, 0);

   Print("RAM criada: ", MMF_NAME,
         " | ", RECORD_COUNT, " slots x ", RECORD_BYTES,
         " bytes = ", (RECORD_COUNT * RECORD_BYTES) / 1024, " KB");
   return true;
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| ReleaseSharedMemory                                              |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void ReleaseSharedMemory()
{
   if(pBase != 0) { UnmapViewOfFile(pBase); pBase = 0; }
   if(hMap  != 0) { CloseHandle(hMap);      hMap  = 0; }
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| OnInit                                                           |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
int OnInit()
{
   RECORD_BYTES = InpRecordBytes;
   RECORD_COUNT = InpRecordCount;
   FOCUS_SLOT   = InpFocusSlot;
   MMF_NAME     = InpMMFName;
   g_rotIdx     = 0;

   // AUTO-SELECT: busca todos os ativos do servidor sem intervenção manual
   if(InpAutoSelect)
      AutoSelectAllSymbols();

   if(!InitSharedMemory())
      return INIT_FAILED;

   if(!EventSetMillisecondTimer(InpTimerMs))
   {
      Print("ERRO EventSetMillisecondTimer: ", GetLastError());
      ReleaseSharedMemory();
      return INIT_FAILED;
   }

   int mwTotal = SymbolsTotal(true);
   double voltaMs = MathCeil((double)mwTotal / InpSymsPerCycle) * InpTimerMs;

   Print("=== Sentinel RAM v5.20 INICIADO ===");
   Print("Market Watch: ", mwTotal, " simbolos");
   Print("Timer: ", InpTimerMs, "ms | Por ciclo: ", InpSymsPerCycle);
   Print("Volta completa em: ~", (int)voltaMs, "ms (~",
         DoubleToString(voltaMs / 1000.0, 2), "s)");
   Print("RAM: ", MMF_NAME, " | Slots: ", RECORD_COUNT);

   return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| OnDeinit                                                         |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void OnDeinit(const int reason)
{
   EventKillTimer();
   ReleaseSharedMemory();
   Print("Sentinel RAM encerrado. Razao: ", reason);
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| OnTick — Atualização imediata do símbolo em foco no slot 0      |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void OnTick()
{
   hb_global++;
   long tsMs = (long)TimeTradeServer() * 1000;
   ProcessSymbol(Symbol(), tsMs, true);
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| OnTimer — Rotação contínua por TODOS os símbolos do Market Watch |
//|                                                                  |
//| Exemplo com 4.500 símbolos:                                      |
//|   InpSymsPerCycle=200, timer=50ms → volta em ~1.125ms (~1,1s)   |
//|   InpSymsPerCycle=500, timer=50ms → volta em ~450ms             |
//|   InpSymsPerCycle=500, timer=25ms → volta em ~225ms             |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
void OnTimer()
{
   hb_global++;
   long tsMs  = (long)TimeTradeServer() * 1000;
   int  total = SymbolsTotal(true);
   if(total == 0) return;

   if(g_rotIdx >= total) g_rotIdx = 0;

   // Símbolo em foco sempre atualizado
   ProcessSymbol(Symbol(), tsMs, true);

   // Lote deste ciclo
   int processed = 0;
   while(processed < InpSymsPerCycle && g_rotIdx < total)
   {
      string sym = SymbolName(g_rotIdx, true);
      g_rotIdx++;
      if(sym == Symbol()) continue;
      ProcessSymbol(sym, tsMs, false);
      processed++;
   }

   if(g_rotIdx >= total) g_rotIdx = 0;

   // Log de saúde a cada 100 ciclos
   healthCheck++;
   if(healthCheck >= 100)
   {
      Print("HB: ",       hb_global,
            " | MW: ",    total,
            " | Ciclo: ", processed,
            " | Volta: ~",
            (int)MathCeil((double)total / InpSymsPerCycle) * InpTimerMs, "ms");
      healthCheck = 0;
   }
}

//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//| LAYOUT DA MEMÓRIA — referência para o Node.js producer           |
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
//
//  Local\B3RAM  —  8192 slots x 128 bytes = 1 MB
//
//  Offset | Bytes | Tipo   | Campo      | Node.js read
//  -------|-------|--------|------------|------------------------------
//  0      | 8     | double | bid        | buf.readDoubleLE(0)
//  8      | 8     | double | ask        | buf.readDoubleLE(8)
//  16     | 8     | int64  | volume     | buf.readBigInt64LE(16)
//  24     | 8     | int64  | timestamp  | buf.readBigInt64LE(24)
//  32     | 4     | int32  | anomaly    | buf.readInt32LE(32)
//  36     | 4     | int32  | heartbeat  | buf.readInt32LE(36)
//  40     | 4     | int32  | write_flag | buf.readInt32LE(40)  ← checar == 0
//  44     | 16    | char[] | symbol     | buf.toString('ascii',44,60).replace(/\0/g,'')
//  60     | 68    | —      | reservado  | —
//
//+------------------------------------------------------------------+
